item.title: Hexagonal Architecture
item.description: Discover how Hexagonal Architecture transforms software design, bringing practical benefits to your project. Explore its effectiveness and application in this in-depth study.

item.title: Integration Architecture
item.description: Integration architecture refers to the structure and design of systems that facilitate communication and interaction between different software components, systems, or applications.

item.title: 📺 Live - Hello Kotlin | Learn Development on the Android Platform using Kotlin and Android Studio
item.description: In this live session we presented the main features of the most widely used language for Android app development.

item.title: 🎙️ Podcast - Clean Code
item.description: In this episode we'll talk about Clean Code, its importance and relevance in the market. We'll have a chat about real experiences from our technical team on the subject.

item.title: 📺 Live - Programming Languages (Tier List)
item.description: Live about programming languages in general.

item.title: 📺 Live - Answering Questions About Starting a Career as a Developer!
item.description: Live chat session aimed at answering your questions about starting a career as a Developer.

item.title: About Requirements Gathering
item.description: In this article I'll share some tips and methods for gathering the necessary requirements for system development. This document will accompany all adjacent stages of development, so it's crucial to understand the user's needs.

item.title: Monitoring Queries in PostgreSQL
item.description: Learn how to identify, monitor, and manage running queries in PostgreSQL. Essential techniques for maintaining the health of your database.

item.title: What is S.O.L.I.D?
item.description: This article explores in an accessible way the fundamentals of this approach to software design. Learn and apply these principles for more robust and flexible code.

item.title: 🎙️ Podcast - Tales of a Developer and Study Plans
item.description: In this episode we'll talk about the development world and how to set up or organize yourself to plan a career study, check out the conversation and share your experience with us.

item.title: 🎙️ Podcast - Revolutionary Ideas with the Increase of Information
item.description: In this episode we'll discuss how the increase of information has made revolutionary ideas more and more frequent.
